state.next-action:
SITE FIXES — NON-NEGOTIABLE BEFORE ANYTHING ELSE. Session 2026-04-10 ended with 5+ broken promises due to worktree branch confusion (now resolved — main branch clean, no worktrees, 32 runs, 19 playable). NEXT SESSION MUST RUN gad snapshot FIRST per session-discipline skill, then execute these in order:
=== PRIORITY 1: LANDING PAGE FIXES (asked 5+ times, never shipped) ===
(A) EXPERIMENT LOG (was "Rounds" component, rename to ExperimentLog): - Paginate by round with project + hypothesis filters - Keyword search across log entries (narrow search just for this section) - Tags + references linking to source evals/findings - Show TBD for unreviewed rounds - Filter by project (escape-the-dungeon, gad-explainer-video, etc) - Filter by hypothesis (freedom, CSH, emergent-evolution, etc) - Round conclusions per round (not just "Round 3 results" forever)
(B) RESULTS SECTION: Must update dynamically per round, not hardcoded to Round 3. Same filtering as experiment log. Per-round conclusions.
(C) HOVER INFO PANELS on eval components in Playable Archive — use shadcn HoverCard or Popover. On hover of any eval badge/card, show detailed panel with tokens, duration, hypothesis, condition, trace status, review status.
(D) LOOP SECTION pagination showing different hypothesis loops and how they evolve.
=== PRIORITY 2: TECHNICAL STACK ===
(A) Install zustand + zustand/immer for shared state (stop prop drilling + custom events). Use for filter state shared between chart, playable archive, experiment log, results.
(B) Install react-query (@tanstack/react-query) for any client-side data fetching + caching if needed.
(C) Install lucide-animated icons: pnpm dlx shadcn@latest registry add @lucide-animated. Use animated icons throughout the site for visual energy.
(D) Use shadcn components properly: HoverCard for info panels, Popover for filter dropdowns, Dialog for modals, Charts for interactive graphs. Stop reinventing.
(E) Rename Rounds component to ExperimentLog everywhere.
=== PRIORITY 3: DATA ARCHITECTURE ===
(A) data/ IS the pseudo-database. Move ALL hardcoded site data into data/*.json: - data/hypotheses.json — hypothesis definitions, status, evidence summary - data/rounds.json — round conclusions, findings references, status - data/eval-conditions.json — the 5-condition matrix descriptions - data/graph-series.json — precomputed chart data points - data/media.json — video/image references for the site Keep existing: open-questions.json, bugs.json, glossary.json, feature-requests.json
(B) data/ should also reference media (videos, images). Media FILES live in starter repos or external URLs (NOT in the GAD repo to avoid bloat). data/media.json holds URLs + metadata.
(C) Remove broken screenshot references from GitHub starter repo READMEs. The image URLs point at screenshots we deleted from the GAD repo. Remove the img tags.
=== PRIORITY 4: HOOK ERROR HANDLING ===
(A) gad-trace-hook.cjs: create .planning/ dir if it doesn't exist (don't error). The user accepted the hook on install — it should work silently.
(B) Log rotation: keep last 1000 events max in .trace-events.jsonl. Truncate oldest when limit reached. Don't let logs grow unbounded.
(C) Hook error logging: write which hook failed + what the error was to a separate .claude/hooks.log with timestamps. Don't just print "hook error" — say what happened.
=== CONTEXT ===
Round 5: 19 playable builds deployed. TRACE data is stub-only (no behavioral events). Feature request anthropics/claude-code#46279 submitted for worktree hook inheritance. Clone-based eval runner exists (scripts/eval-clone-run.sh) but untested. User has NOT played round 5 builds yet — waiting for site fixes first. Do NOT run more evals until site is fixed and user has reviewed round 5. Follow the session-discipline skill. Follow the GAD loop. Do NOT use worktree isolation for subagents — use the clone-based approach or run changes directly on main.
